meta.methodology: DRVEF2022 field RMFRGNCN: count related to nonresident foreign students in IPEDS derived fall enrollment — **not** post-graduation destination. For country-of-destination after UW, use LinkedIn aggregate harvest + disclaimers.
meta.disclaimer: This tab’s primary bar is an enrollment-related IPEDS aggregate, not ‘where alumni moved.’ Do not interpret as career migration statistics.

ipeds_foreign_context.title: IPEDS foreign-national context (DRVEF2022, UW–Madison) — not destination
